headlines.title: Just how K-shaped is the U.S. economy? The top 10% spend nearly as much, excluding essentials, as bottom 70% combined
headlines.summary: The gulf between the rich and everyone else is laid out in a stark analysis done by Bank of America’s economists on household spending.

headlines.title: Ukrainian drones hit Russia’s largest oil refinery as Zelenskyy says Siberia now ‘within reach’
headlines.summary: The attack underscores Kyiv's enhanced long-range drone capabilities and comes on the eve of a crucial NATO summit.

headlines.title: Oil prices rise after report of Iranian attack on commercial ships in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: Brent and U.S. crude futures rose after a report of an Iranian attack on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Billionaire John Arnold commits $2.6 million to study online sports betting risk
headlines.summary: John Arnold, who runs Arnold Ventures with his wife, Laura, is investing $2.6 million for university research into potential harms of online sports betting.

headlines.title: ‘I make my own pizza.’ What’s the best way you’ve found to save money?
headlines.summary: “Saving money doesn’t have to be about pizza — it could be coffee, cooking, cleaning, vacations, or anything else.”

headlines.title: World Cup in photos: Belgium beats U.S. 4-1 after Balogun controversy, Ronaldo exits
headlines.summary: The U.S. is out of the World Cup, losing 4-1 to Belgium in the Round of 16 in a match blemished by suspension of Folarin Balogun's red card. Ronaldo exits.

headlines.title: Samsung posts 1,800% jump in profit, but AI spending concerns spook investors
headlines.summary: Samsung Electronics shares fell even after record preliminary second-quarter profit as capex and demand concerns clouded the outlook.

headlines.title: Chinese AI models are gaining ground with U.S. companies as OpenAI, Anthropic costs surge
headlines.summary: Recent model releases from Chinese companies including DeepSeek and Z.ai are seen by many as highly competitive compared to leading U.S. frontier systems.

headlines.title: ‘The money would have been life-changing’: My father told my grandmother to slash my inheritance. Is that fair?
headlines.summary: “I could have bought a home for what I hope will be a growing family.”

headlines.title: SpaceX’s two lead underwriters have a $1 trillion chasm in their valuation as quiet period ends
headlines.summary: The two lead underwriters on SpaceX’s initial public offering, Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley, have a valuation gap of more than $1 trillion as they both initiated coverage at buy.

headlines.title: 主權 AI 議題升溫！美國總統令：AI Cybersecurity 躍升國安議題 - CIO Taiwan
headlines.summary: 主權 AI 議題升溫！美國總統令：AI Cybersecurity 躍升國安議題  CIO Taiwan

headlines.title: 陸官員：陸今年AI手機/AI電腦銷量將首逾非AI產品 - 台視全球資訊網

event_impact.interpretation_input: Python 已依新聞標題、摘要、標的別名、產業主題與事件關鍵字，建立事件與觀察標的的規則式連結。

PMI.summary: PMI 尚未接入可靠公開資料來源。

US10Y.name: US10Y
US10Y.display_name: 美國 10 年期公債殖利率

items.name: 美國 10 年期公債殖利率

analysis.summary: Fed Funds Rate 3.63，近 3 期趨勢 持平；美國 10 年期公債殖利率 0.0，近 3 期趨勢 最近一期下降；VIX 15.84，近 3 期趨勢 最近一期上升。整體總經風險分級：low。

economy.summary: Fed Funds Rate 3.63，近 3 期趨勢 持平；美國 10 年期公債殖利率 0.0，近 3 期趨勢 最近一期下降；VIX 15.84，近 3 期趨勢 最近一期上升。整體總經風險分級：low。

strategies.price_above_ma200: 收盤價高於 200 日均線時持有，否則空手。
strategies.ma20_cross_ma60: 20 日均線高於 60 日均線時持有，否則空手。
strategies.buy_and_hold: 買入持有基準，用於比較策略是否優於單純持有。

assumptions.transaction_cost_note: 每次部位變化扣除 0.1% 交易成本，用於保守估計。
assumptions.lookahead_bias_control: 策略使用前一交易日訊號承擔下一交易日報酬，避免偷看未來資料。

signals.disclaimer: 研究訊號僅供分析，不是買賣建議。
